title: GameState
description: Serializable runtime state of an in-progress card game session. Stored in localStorage under 'svelte-solitaire:state:{gameId}'.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for forward/backward compatibility detection. Mismatch causes state to be discarded.

gameId.description: Game type identifier. Must match an existing game config.

sessionId.description: UUID v4 generated at the start of each new game session for telemetry deduplication.

deck.description: Remaining cards in the stock pile (top of array = top of stock).

waste.description: Cards that have been drawn from the stock (top of array = top-most visible card).

foundations.description: Foundation piles. Each sub-array represents one foundation; index 0 = bottom card (Ace).

tableau.description: Tableau columns. Each sub-array = one column; index 0 = bottom card.

score.description: Current game score. Never goes below 0.

moves.description: Total number of valid moves made in this session.

elapsedSeconds.description: Time elapsed (in seconds) during active gameplay. Paused when tab is hidden.

drawMode.description: Number of cards drawn per stock click.

isComplete.description: True if the win condition has been reached.

history.description: Undo history stack. Last item is the most recent move. Popped on undo.

suit.description: Suit identifier — must match a value in the game config's suits array.

faceUp.description: Whether the card is face-up (visible to the player).

index.description: Which pile within the category (e.g., tableau column 0–6). Omitted for stock and waste.

moveRecord.description: A reversible record of a single game action.

cards.description: Snapshot of the cards involved in this move (pre-move state for undo).

scoreChange.description: Score delta applied by this move. Reversed on undo.

flippedCardIndex.description: If this move caused a face-down card to flip, records its tableau column index so undo can re-flip it.
